Statement B -— Biosynthetic process
continues for some time after the light
becomes unavailable and then stops.
(Pg. 215, E)
A) Both A & B are correct
B) Ais correct and B is incorrect
C) Ais incorrect and B is correct
D) A & B are in correct
83. Calvin discovered that first CO; fixation
product is- (Pg. 215, E)
A) 3-carbon organic acid
B) 4-carbon organic acid
C) 5- carbon organic acid
D) 6-carbon organic acid
84. To discover the first CO; fixation product,
Calvin worked on-using- (Pg. 215, E)
A) algae, radioactive Ci
B) fungi, radioactive Cia
C) algae, radioactive C14
D) fungi, radioactive Cia
85. The first product of CO, fixation was
identified to be in the Calvin cycle.
(Pg. 215, E)
A) PGA B) RUBP
C) Citric acid D) OAA
86. In C4 pathway, first CO: fixation product is
same options as (Pg. 215, E)
A) PGA B) RUBP
C) Citric acid D) OAA
87. OAA and PGA stands for- (Pg. 216, E)
A) 3-phophoglyceric acid and oxalis
ascetic acid respectively
B) 3-peptido glutaric acid and oxalis
ascetic acid respectively
C) 3-phosphas glutamic acid and oxalis
ascetic acid respectively
D) None of these
13.7.1 The primary Acceptor of
Co:
88. For a 3 carbon compound to be formed
after CO» fixation, the acceptor molecule is
of- (Pg. 216, E)
A) 2-carbon B) 3-carbon
C) 4-carbon D) 5-carbon
89. RUBP stands for- (Pg. 216, E)
A) Ribulose Bisphosphate Carboxylase-
oxygenase
